arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford future: German giants 'to rival' PSG for Man United forward
arts.sum: German giants Bayern Munich are reportedly preparing to rival Paris Saint-Germain for Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Suffer Transfer Setback as PSG Defender Set to Stay
arts.sum: This past summer, Paris Saint-Germain right-back Achraf Hakimi was cited as a potential target for Real Madrid to replace veteran Dani Carvajal in the long term. arts.ttl: Manchester United’s £325,000-a-Week Star Sees Bayern Munich, Olympique Marseille Rival PSG’s Interest
arts.sum: Last week, TEAMTalk reported that Paris Saint-Germain have renewed their interest in Manchester United’s Marcus Rashford, but the hurdles blocking a summer transfer for the winger remain in place. Moreover, the reporting reveals that the Ligue 1 team are still considering swooping for Rashford next year. arts.ttl: Liverpool Star Reveals Mega Contract Demand Amid PSG Interest, Sources Claim
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah’s future at Liverpool is uncertain, as his current contract expires next June. Recent rumors have linked him to Paris Saint-Germain, but he may still stay at Anfield. Even though Salah is getting closer to free agency, Sky Sports pundit Jamie Carragher believes the forward will likely remain at Liverpool to solidify his legacy […] The post Liverpool Star Reveals Mega Contract Demand Amid PSG Interest, Sources Claim appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: PSG Prepared to Increase €10M Annual Salary for Chelsea-Linked Player at Inter Milan
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain manager Luis Enrique will be in the French capital for the long term, and now the Spanish manager can continue to mold the squad into his vision, which might mean securing a more suitable No. 9. arts.ttl: Aston Villa, Newcastle Among Four Premier League Clubs Proposed €95M PSG Standout, Report Confirms
arts.sum: Randal Kolo Muani has been the subject of transfer rumors over the last few days, and links to a move to the Premier League continue to emerge. According to a report from TBR Football this month, Kolo Muani has been offered to several Premier League clubs ahead of the January transfer window. arts.sum: Luis Enrique has defended his Paris Saint-Germain squad from criticism over their performances in this year’s Champions League. The former Spanish national team manager was speaking at a press conference…

arts.ttl: Lucas Hernandez expected to return to training before December
